other_observers: Jane Stulp and I found the bird.  Many others saw it on 5/4 and 5/5.
description: Jane Stulp and I were talking in her front yard, when a humingbird making no noise, came zooming into some flowers, the bird faced us, and had bright ruby red (not pink) throat, with a black chin, and a forked tail, and then it flew over the house.  Later, the bird was seen at the hummingbird feeder in the back yard.  See photos.
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K. Percival, Brandon K. Percival, Brandon K. Percival
